# TenderCopilot
> AI-powered tender management platform for Greek public procurement

## What is TenderCopilot?
TenderCopilot is a SaaS platform that helps Greek companies analyze public procurement documents, check eligibility requirements, and prepare competitive proposals 90% faster using AI.

## Key Features
- Document Analysis: Extract requirements from 100+ page tender documents (PDF, DOCX, XLSX)
- Eligibility Check: 94%+ accuracy AI-powered eligibility assessment
- Tender Discovery: Monitor 19+ procurement platforms (ESIDIS, KIMDIS, EU TED, and more)
- AI Assistant: 24/7 expert tender consultant with source citations
- Financial Strategy: Budget analysis and pricing optimization
- Legal Compliance: Automated legal requirement verification

## Target Market
Greek businesses participating in public procurement (dimosies symvaseis) under Law 4412/2016.

## Pricing
- Starter: EUR 49/month (5 tenders/month, document analysis, eligibility check)
- Professional: EUR 99/month (unlimited tenders, AI assistant, discovery, financial analysis)
- Enterprise: Custom pricing (SSO, SAML, on-premise deployment)

## Links
- Homepage: https://tender-copilot-kappa.vercel.app
- Register: https://tender-copilot-kappa.vercel.app/register
- Login: https://tender-copilot-kappa.vercel.app/login
